name: Wan 2.2
tagline: The fully open flagship of video generation
description: Alibaba's open video suite built on a mixture-of-experts diffusion architecture: 27B text-to-video and image-to-video models, a 5B dense variant with a high-compression VAE for consumer GPUs, plus speech-to-video and character-animation variants.
why: The strongest fully Apache-licensed video family in mid-2026 — photorealistic humans, an unusually broad task spread, and a 5B variant that genuinely runs 720p24 on a single RTX 4090. Its successor (Wan 2.5+) went API-only, making this the open high-water mark.
audience: Video artists, researchers, studios needing commercially safe open weights

setup.requirements: The 5B variant wants a 24GB GPU; the 14B-class variants want 80GB+ or multi-GPU; quantized community builds exist

limitations: Clips are seconds-scale, the big variants effectively need datacenter hardware, and the 5B takes minutes per clip unoptimized.
take: When the next version goes closed, the last open one becomes infrastructure. Expect this checkpoint to be built on for years.
